allow: Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT pid, pname, pemail, ppassword FROM patient;")

Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT a.appoid, a.pid, a.scheduleid, a.status, p.pname, d.docname FROM appointment a JOIN patient p ON a.pid=p.pid JOIN doctor d ON a.scheduleid=d.docid;")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT * FROM webuser WHERE usertype='p';")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "DELETE FROM webuser WHERE usertype='p' AND email NOT IN \(SELECT pemail FROM patient\);")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT email, usertype FROM webuser;")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT docid, docname, docemail FROM doctor LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM doctor;")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT docid, country, city, hospital_branch, available FROM doctor WHERE specialties = \(SELECT id FROM specialties LIMIT 1\) LIMIT 5;")
Bash(mysql -u root -phms123 hospital_management -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as nulls FROM doctor WHERE hospital_branch IS NULL OR country IS NULL;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p hospital_management -e "DESCRIBE appointment; DESCRIBE doctor;")
